channel.title: The Ledger — The Crossroads Inn
channel.description: Stories, whispers, and truths from travelers who passed through the Crossroads Inn.

item.title: A Traveler Arrived Without a Shadow
item.description: She said she'd traded it for directions. The innkeeper poured her tea and didn't ask questions.

item.title: The Room That Breathes at Night
item.description: There is a room on the second floor that the inn only shows to certain guests. The ones who need to hear something they've been ignoring.

item.title: The Soup That Knows Your Name
item.description: Every bowl is different. Every bowl is exactly what you needed. Don't ask how.
